effects: at:staminaDecreased { if:parentPhase==processCost & isVisualTurn { goodImpressionTurns+=2; halfCostTurns+=2 }; limit:1 }

name: あさり先生のおまもり
あさり先生のおまもり
あさり先生のおまもり
わたしたちの約束
effects: at:goodConditionTurnsIncreased { if:isDirectEffect & goodConditionTurnsDelta>=7 & concentration>=13 { goodConditionTurns+=concentration*0.75; concentration/=2; perfectConditionTurns+=1; genki+=2 } }

name: わたしたちの約束+
effects: at:goodConditionTurnsIncreased { if:isDirectEffect & goodConditionTurnsDelta>=7 & concentration>=13 { goodConditionTurns+=concentration*0.75; concentration/=2; perfectConditionTurns+=2; genki+=2 } }

name: あたしたちの約束
effects: at:endOfTurn { if:cumulativeFullPowerCharge>=13 { target:797 { g.scoreTimes+=1 }; fixedStamina-=1; at:turn { moveRandomToHand[baseId(797)]; limit:1 } }; limit:2 }

name: あたしたちの約束+
effects: at:endOfTurn { if:cumulativeFullPowerCharge>=13 { target:797 { g.scoreTimes+=1 }; at:turn { moveRandomToHand[baseId(797)]; limit:1 } }; limit:2 }

name: おかいものバッグ
effects: at:stanceChanged { if:isDirectEffect & isStrength & isDanceTurn & genki==0 { halfCostTurns+=1 } }

name: 夢を創るステッキ
effects: at:endOfTurn { if:turnsElapsed%3==2 { score+=genki*1.1; genki=0; at:turn { drawCard; limit:1 } }; limit:3 }

name: 夢を創るステッキ+
effects: at:endOfTurn { if:turnsElapsed%3==2 { score+=genki*1.3; genki=0; at:turn { drawCard(2); limit:1 } }; limit:3 }

name: 夜空に従える花
effects: at:afterCardUsed { if:prevStance!=none & cardHasEffect(strength) { effectCounter+=1; if:effectCounter%3==2 { setStance(leisure); setEnthusiasmBuff(0.4,1); genki+=3; limit:5 } } }

name: 夜空に従える花+
effects: at:afterCardUsed { if:prevStance!=none & cardHasEffect(strength) { effectCounter+=1; if:effectCounter%3==2 { setStance(leisure); setEnthusiasmBuff(0.4,1); genki+=3 } } }

name: のんびりアフタヌーン
effects: at:fullPowerChargeIncreased { if:isVisualTurn & isDirectEffect & isFullPower { fullPowerCharge+=6 }; limit:1 }

name: 太陽を超える輝き
effects: at:startOfTurn { if:turnsRemaining==1 { genki+=consumedGenki*0.75; drawCard(2); fixedStamina-=3 }; limit:1 }

name: 太陽を超える輝き+
effects: at:startOfTurn { if:turnsRemaining==1 { genki+=consumedGenki*0.75; drawCard(2); fixedStamina-=1 }; limit:1 }

name: 憧れ続けた輝き
effects: at:cardUsed { if:goodConditionTurns>=8 & cardHasEffect(goodConditionTurns) { effectCounter+=1; if:effectCounter%4==3 { perfectConditionTurns+=1; cardUsesRemaining+=1; drawCard; fixedStamina-=1; limit:5 } } }

name: 憧れ続けた輝き+
effects: at:cardUsed { if:goodConditionTurns>=6 & cardHasEffect(goodConditionTurns) { effectCounter+=1; if:effectCounter%4==3 { perfectConditionTurns+=1; cardUsesRemaining+=1; drawCard; limit:5 } } }

name: 想定外のチケット
effects: at:afterStartOfTurn { if:isVisualTurn & goodConditionTurns>=10 { goodConditionTurns+=3; moveRandomToHand[pIdol & (deck | discarded)]; cardUsesRemaining+=1 }; limit:1 }

name: すべてを賭けた輝き
effects: at:afterCardUsed { if:cardSourceType==pIdol & stamina>=maxStamina*0.8 { costReduction+=1; cardUsesRemaining+=1; fixedStamina-=2 }; limit:3 }

name: すべてを賭けた輝き+
effects: at:afterCardUsed { if:cardSourceType==pIdol & stamina>=maxStamina*0.8 { costReduction+=1; genki+=1; cardUsesRemaining+=1; fixedStamina-=1 }; limit:3 }

name: 強い意志の輝き
effects: at:motivationIncreased { if:isDirectEffect { effectCounter+=1; if:effectCounter%5==4 { motivationMultiplier=2; genki+=10; fixedStamina-=1; limit:2 } } }

name: 強い意志の輝き+
effects: at:motivationIncreased { if:isDirectEffect { effectCounter+=1; if:effectCounter%5==4 { motivationMultiplier=2; genki+=15; limit:2 } } }

name: 溢れ出る想い
effects: at:afterCardUsed[mental] { if:goodConditionTurns>=5 { effectCounter+=1; if:effectCounter%3==2 { goodConditionTurns+=3; perfectConditionTurns+=1; limit:3 } } }

name: 溢れ出る想い+
effects: at:afterCardUsed[mental] { if:goodConditionTurns>=5 { effectCounter+=1; if:effectCounter%3==2 { goodConditionTurns+=3; perfectConditionTurns+=1; genki+=3; limit:3 } } }

name: 恋心のゆくえ
effects: at:startOfTurn { if:isVisualTurn & isPreservation { genki+=3; moveRandomToHand[effect(strength) & (deck | discarded)]; limit:3 } }

effects: at:activeCardUsed { if:goodImpressionTurns>=10 { effectCounter+=1; if:effectCounter%2==1 { goodImpressionTurns+=6; at:turn { drawCard; limit:1 }; limit:2 } } }

effects: at:activeCardUsed { if:goodImpressionTurns>=10 { effectCounter+=1; if:effectCounter%2==1 { goodImpressionTurns+=6; at:turn { drawCard; limit:1 }; limit:3 } } }

name: 全力おうえんうちわ
effects: at:cardUsed[active] { if:isVocalTurn & genki<=30 { goodImpressionTurns+=3; setScoreBuff(0.1,5) }; limit:1 }
